title: ListTapePoolsInput
description: ListTapePoolsInput schema from Amazon Storage Gateway API

allOf.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of each of the custom tape pools you want to list. If you don't specify a custom tape pool ARN, the response lists all custom tape pools.
A string that indicates the position at which to begin the returned list of tape pools.
An optional number limit for the tape pools in the list returned by this call.
